channel.title: Sai Nikhil | Graduate Student - Applied Mathematics | Aspiring Machine Learning Engineer
channel.description: An aspiring Machine Learning Engineer. I'm looking for internships and co-ops in Machine Learning/Data Science for Summer 2021

item.title: Bit Utilities
item.description: Convert a number in binary system to its decimal equivalent Please note that the input will be given as a decimal number containing only…
item.content:encoded:
Convert a number in binary system to its decimal equivalent

Please note that the input will be given as a decimal number containing only digits 0 and 1. For example: 100101011.

In order to convert a generic number in binary form to a decimal form, we use following simple technique. Consider a generic binary number ($b1b2$).

$$ E = mc^{2} $$

const helloWorld = (name = 'World') => {
  return `Hello ${name}!`;
};

helloWorld();
helloWorld('John Doe');
